name: FctsCaseMgtContactDtlExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_in AS (SELECT DISTINCT CMCM_ID, CMCT_SEQ_NO, CMLG_SEQ_NO, CMLG_INPUT_DTM, CMLG_MCTR_CALL, CMLG_TEXT, CMLG_METHOD, CMLG_USID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_CMLG_LOG) SELECT RTRIM(LTRIM(cte_in.CMCM_ID)) + ';' + CAST(cte_in.CMLG_SEQ_NO AS VARCHAR(10)) + ';' + dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}) AS PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING, @{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp} AS FIRST_RECYC_TS, dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}) AS SRC_SYS_CD, RTRIM(LTRIM(cte_in.CMCM_ID)) AS CASE_MGT_ID, cte_in.CMCT_SEQ_NO AS CNTCT_SEQ_NO, cte_in.CMLG_SEQ_NO AS LOG_SEQ_NO, cte_in.CMLG_INPUT_DTM AS LOG_DTM, dbo.trim_default(cte_in.CMLG_TEXT) AS LOG_SUM_TX, dbo.trim_default(cte_in.CMLG_MCTR_CALL) AS CMLG_MCTR_CALL, dbo.trim_default(cte_in.CMLG_METHOD) AS CMLG_METHOD, dbo.trim_default(cte_in.CMLG_USID) AS CMLG_USID FROM cte_in

Description:
Called By: FctsMedMgtCntl


Process : Extract Case Mgt Status data from Facets to DataSet which is processed and loaded to CASE_MGT_CNTCT table
